results.title: Family of Weapon Sight - Individual - Full Rate Production ...
excerpts: The Family of Weapon Sight - Individual (FWS-I) Full Rate Production Master Indefinite Delivery/Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract is a comprehensive procurement vehicle focused on producing advanced weapon-mounted infrared imaging systems for the U.S. Army. The contract supports the acquisition of long-wave infrared sensors designed to provide soldiers with enhanced target acquisition
